problem.summary: Compute sampled dense-dense products only at sparse edge or block-mask locations, with attention-score metadata and coalescing contracts visible.
outputs: sparse score values matching the input sparsity pattern
constraints: Template-only; record sparse format, edge ordering, duplicate policy, and block size
Compare against rocSPARSE/Composable Kernel sparse where feasible
Do not fold softmax or PV timing into SDDMM-only claims

verification.method: Implement the baseline, optimized candidate, and CPU or strongest-library oracle where applicable; compare outputs before timing claims.

curation.notes: Promoted from the v2 extension backlog as wave 2. No performance, correctness, or profiler evidence is claimed yet.
